blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 40 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 54°F.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
